intent_policy: This task is for exploratory social simulation before the author has a detailed writing plan.
Output only the author-facing sparse writing intent.
Keep the output schema minimal; do not add seed entities, retrieval needs, query plans, simulation plans, scene beats, or answer hints as separate fields.
Keep only anchors needed to define the exploration space, such as central characters, broad location, occasion, important object, or immediate situation.
Prefer an open-ended setup over a target outcome.
Avoid full synopsis, exact dialogue, exact action choreography, required endings, detailed emotional turns, evidence spans, and retrieval instructions.
The output must be parseable JSON.
